fallback_contact.rationale: Winnipeg Mint Construction at 301-1661 Portage Ave is a small commercial/residential GC. No public estimator named. Note: separate company 'MiNT Construction LLC' (Utah) and 'MINT Projects' (Calgary) exist — do not confuse them.

needs_review_flags: Multiple companies share the 'Mint' name — confirm Winnipeg-based entity before outreach.
Winnipeg Mint = small commercial/residential GC; estimator likely is the owner.
Recommend website contact form as cold-outreach channel; phone fallback.
